name: Xero Accounting API
description: Xero Accounting API provides a REST API for programmatic access to its features. Use it to automate workflows and integrate with other services.

capabilities.name: accounting
capabilities.description: Manage accounting — updates a specific batch payment for invoices and credit notes, updates or creates one or more spent or received money transaction, updates or creates one or more contacts in a xero organisation. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
